packages.title: MICE Solutions
packages.overview: Our MICE (Meetings, Incentives, Conferences & Exhibitions) solutions are end-to-end corporate travel programs tailored to your organization's unique goals. From venue scouting and logistics to AV coordination and post-event reporting, we handle every detail so you can focus on outcomes.
highlights: Dedicated event coordinator from planning to execution
Curated venue selection across 50+ global destinations
Custom branding & décor at all touchpoints
24/7 on-site support team
Comprehensive post-event analytics & ROI reporting

itinerary.title: Arrival & Registration
activities: Airport pickups & hotel check-in for all delegates

itinerary.title: Conference Day 2 & Excursion
activities: Afternoon team excursion or leisure activity

packages.title: Team Outings
packages.overview: Strengthen team bonds and boost morale with our carefully crafted team outing programs. From adventure camps in the hills to beach retreats and city escapes, we design experiences that foster collaboration, communication, and shared joy — turning colleagues into a cohesive, motivated team.
highlights: Expert-facilitated team building activities
Choose from adventure, cultural, or leisure themes
Scalable for teams of 20 to 500+ people
Customized schedule matching your team's energy
Full-service accommodation & dining arrangements

itinerary.title: Team Building Day
activities: Evening: Cultural program or bonfire night

packages.title: Incentive Travel
packages.overview: Reward your top performers with extraordinary incentive travel programs that they will talk about for years. Our luxury incentive packages to the world's most aspirational destinations — Maldives, Europe, Dubai, Bali — are designed to inspire, motivate, and retain your best talent.
highlights: 5-star accommodations at iconic resorts
Exclusive access to VIP experiences
Personal butler & concierge service
Custom recognition moments & awards
Curated fine dining across every destination

itinerary.title: VIP Arrival
activities: Welcome gala dinner at a signature restaurant

itinerary.title: Signature Experiences
activities: Exclusive destination experience (yacht, safari, vineyard, etc.)

itinerary.title: Leisure & Celebration
activities: Free morning: leisure activities at resort
Farewell gala dinner with live entertainment

packages.title: Conference Tours
packages.overview: Blend business with pleasure on our conference tour programs. We handle all event logistics — from venue booking and conference setup to guided leisure tours that let attendees explore the destination. A seamless experience where professional goals and personal enrichment go hand in hand.
highlights: Professional conference venue setup & AV support
Guided leisure tours to local highlights
Seamless integration of business & exploration
Networking dinner events at landmark restaurants
Post-conference extension tour options

itinerary.title: Arrival & Pre-Conference
activities: Arrive at conference city, hotel check-in

itinerary.title: Extension or Departure
activities: OR: City highlights half-day & airport transfer
